name: aws-s3
description: AWS S3 -- upload files, download files, and generate presigned URLs

src/suite.ts.methods: s3(config: S3Config): this { this.s3Config = config; return this; }

src/types/suite.ts.type-imports: import type { S3Config, UploadOptions, UploadFileResult, DownloadFileResult, PresignedUrlResult } from "./aws-s3.js";
src/types/suite.ts.service-types: s3: { uploadFile(bucket: string, key: string, filePath: string, options?: UploadOptions): Promise<UploadFileResult>; downloadFile(bucket: string, key: string, localPath: string): Promise<DownloadFileResult>; getPresignedUrl(bucket: string, key: string, expiresIn?: number): Promise<PresignedUrlResult>; };
